title: The Cardinal Sins
description: Fight bosses based off of the Seven deadly sins and many more while using unique custom weapons with abilities!
body:
![cardinal sins](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4ea284f084f6f28d0889479fac05a342ccde3c8.png)

**The Cardinal Sins mod adds over 10 new bosses. From seven being based off of the seven deadly sins to three mythical bosses and the final boss Lucifer! Challenge these tough bosses and craft their weaponry to strengthen yourself in your Minecraft world.**

**Developed by Ast0.**

**THIS MOD REQUIRES GECKOLIB!**

**This mod is also compatible with Better Combat!**

List of all the bosses and their respective biomes below:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

Linneaus, Sin of Sloth:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![sloth](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff067aa39cf8657e3137c13e5755e5be2d59ddbb.png)
A floating island that can be found in the skies of the forgotten forest biome.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

![gluttony](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/767889636c8c50cabb0d579ac880adbe8da1409c.png)

How to progress the Mod:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

In the forgotten forest biome, there are two types of floating pillars, normal ones with normal lanterns, and blue lit lantern ones. The blue ones contain a new block called Malevolichite Ore, upon mining this you will obtain Malevolichite Shards. This is useful to craft items such as weapons or to summon the first boss of the sins, the Sin of Sloth.

![crafts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1605e58ba71e3d1f3ed879243e8f2786477b6494.png)

Defeating all the Sins in order goes as follows:
Sloth > Gluttony > Lust > Greed > Envy > Wrath > Pride > Atrocity

How to spawn the Sin of Sloth (First Boss):

![shrine](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9f34febd5e32c3e3c90b6c9055a11df00ec30351.png)

Right-Click the Malevolichite Shrine with a SoulWeaver Orb to summon the Sin of Sloth. Afterwards the next boss will need an orb that contains the essence of the previously killed boss.

Upon killing Drakara you may obtain her egg. Placing this down and waiting 5 minutes will hatch a baby Verdant Wyrm. After another 5 minutes it will mature into an adult and you will be able to tame it. Watch out as it might try attacking you once it'd grow up. After taming you can use them to travel the world by land.

</details>

![important](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb369ce079396766f342361afa29c0bb5841d8d3.png)

**The mod is currently not planned to any other versions nor is a fabric version being planned soon right now.**
